content.en:
"This Super Secret Treasure is very good. "

Ye Tian held the Wind Splitting Knife in his hand and smiled.

With this super-superior super-dimensional treasure, his strength is even stronger.

I have to say that this Wind Rift God is really rich, and in addition to this super dimensional secret treasure, there are many good things.

But now, it's all his.

"The Ice Ghost Organization knows that so many peak realm gods have fallen into my hands, and I have lost so many resources, I will definitely die of anger!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In addition to this, the Ice Ghost Organization Branch of the Ice Wind Sea also contains a lot of resources.

And now it belongs to him.

......

Sea of Ice Wind.

Division of the Ice Ghost Organization.

Ye Tian occupied this place alone, and the battle here was also passed out, attracting the attention of other forces.

Airplanes!!!!

The will of a pinnacle realm god spilled over, trying to understand the situation here.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian urged the power of the extradimensional power and let out a shock.

"It's a real extradimensional power!!05!!"

"Can't be provoked!"

"Let's go!"

These pinnacle realm gods withdrew their will one after another and withdrew far from here.

In their opinion, the peak realm god who had comprehended the power of the extradimensional dimension, even if he did not break through to the half-step extradimensional realm, was not something they could deal with.

It is always the extradimensional power that can deal with the extradimensional power, and even if they fuse the extradimensional things, they can borrow the extradimensional power inside the extradimensional things, but they are far less than the real extradimensional power.

Therefore, even if they were curious about the Ice Ghost Organization Branch, they would not come to investigate.

After not being disturbed by the peak realm gods, Ye Tian began to collect the resources here.

Soon, he had his sights set on the branch's treasure trove.

Click!!!!

Under the invasion of extradimensional power, these formations were shattered by him like papier-mâché.

After a while, Ye Tian came to the treasure house.

"There are really a lot of extra-dimensional resources!!!

Ye Tian was very satisfied.

In addition to some super-dimensional resources, there are also many super-dimensional Dao inheritances, various super-dimensional secret treasures, etc., but there are no super-dimensional secret treasures.

After all, the super-level super-dimensional secret treasure is so precious, and the strength of the peak realm god has increased too much, if there is still a super-super-dimensional secret treasure here, it is impossible for that wind rift realm god not to take it.

After all, if there is one more super-grade super-dimensional secret treasure, the increase in strength is completely different.

Although there are no super-dimensional secret treasures, there are six high-level super-dimensional secret treasures.

In addition to these resources, Ye Tian is also extremely interested in the many materials and classics here, which introduce all aspects and just make up for Ye Tian's lack of knowledge.

After that, Ye Tian stayed here to browse through those classic knowledges, and was not in a hurry to explore this Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Twenty-Two Territory.

Not long after, Ye Tian browsed all the classics and inheritances here, and his knowledge reserve skyrocketed.

Moreover, he also learned a lot of information.

The Ice Ghost Organization is good at gathering intelligence, after all, they often have to rob, so they must know the right information, and this treasure trove contains a lot of information.

This territory is about three times larger than the territory of 7362, and it is also more powerful, although there is no existence of a half-step transcendent realm here, but it has stepped out of the existence of several half-step transcendent realms.

As for those strong people who go out, it is not clear whether they have ever been born in the superdimensional realm, but there should be, after all, the existence of the half-step superdimensional realm, as long as the foundation potential is fine, they can break through to the extradimensional realm.

"According to the information of the Ice Ghost Organization, in addition to the extra-dimensional realm of the Ice Wind Sea, there are three other extra-dimensional realms in this territory, and each extra-dimensional realm is very powerful, there are thousands of forces comparable to the supreme forces of the eternal realm, there are many existences close to the half-step extradimensional realm, and there is even a peak realm god who has condensed fourteen eternal realm spirits, and his combat power is even no less than that of the half-step extradimensional realm. "

How the peak realm god could match the half-step transcendent realm in terms of combat power, Ye Tian didn't understand it before, but now he understands it.

That's the makeover![]

It is too difficult to comprehend the power of the superdimension, and the endless peak realm gods cannot comprehend the power of the superdimension, and the cultivation has been stuck at the peak realm god level, even if more eternal realm spirits are condensed, the increase in combat power will not be too great.

Therefore, many peak realm gods tried to improve their combat effectiveness, and finally researched a path, that is, to transform the physical body.

For example, using special methods to integrate the bloodlines of some extremely powerful or even half-step extradimensional creatures into themselves, and transform themselves into beings close to extradimensional creatures.

In this way, the physical body will be extremely powerful, and with the Eternal Realm Spirit and the Eternal Dao Species, the combat power will be extremely terrifying.

"No wonder the body of the Wind Rift God is so terrifying, it should have been transformed into a physical body. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

But the sequelae of this transformation are very large, that is, the destruction of the foundation, resulting in the impossibility of becoming a transcendent realm in the future, because the transformed body is almost not his original body, and it is not the same as his own cultivation path, and the future path has been distorted.

Therefore, even if you comprehend the true extradimensional power in the later stage, you can only barely break through to the half-step extradimensional realm, but you can't break through to the extradimensional realm.

Of course, there are also advantages to doing this, that is, the combat power in the peak realm god realm is very strong 500, far beyond the average peak realm god, and the effect of resisting extra-dimensional assimilation is very good, so that it will not be completely assimilated by extra-dimensional.

Some of them are in extradimensional assimilation, and they use various resources again and again to barely suppress the pinnacle realm gods of extradimensional assimilation, and if there is a channel to transform the physical body, they will definitely try to transform the physical body.

It's a pity that how to transform the physical body is also the secret of the major forces, and ordinary peak realm gods can't get such a inheritance at all.

"It's a pity that this branch doesn't have a way to transform, otherwise it would really be possible for the peak realm god of the human race to try it. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Although the Ice Wind Sea is said to be stronger than the Eternal Realm, it is still not of high grade, and there is not even a half-step transcendent realm here, so naturally there are no powerful inheritances and good things.

He's still aiming for more powerful territories, and the Icewind Sea really has a channel to connect to other realms.

This channel is the force behind the Garan Treasure Ship - the Garan Chamber of Commerce, which has a branch of the Garan Chamber of Commerce.

"There is no branch of the Garan Chamber of Commerce on the Eternal Border, it should be that the Eternal Border is too weak to be worth building a branch of the Garan Chamber of Commerce, but the territory where the Ice Wind Sea is located is barely worth opening a chamber of commerce. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, it is still difficult to leave this territory through this channel.
